ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "artist_description" TEXT /* Description of the artist */,
  "artist_birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the artist */,
  "artist_deathdate" TEXT /* Deathdate of the artist (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "album" TEXT /* Album the song belongs to */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the song */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the song in seconds */,
  "bpm" INTEGER /* Beats per minute (BPM) */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the song (e.g. C#m) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_genres" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "genre_weight" REAL /* Weight of the genre for the song (used for multi-genre classification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the song */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the song */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in milliseconds */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the song */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the song */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the song */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the song */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the song */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the song */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the song */,
  "spectral_centroid" REAL /* Spectral centroid of the song */,
  "spectral_bandwidth" REAL /* Spectral bandwidth of the song */,
  "spectral_contrast" REAL /* Spectral contrast of the song */,
  "spectral_rolloff" REAL /* Spectral rolloff of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the song was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listening_history" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "listen_date" TEXT /* Date the user listened to the song */,
  "listen_duration" INTEGER /* Duration the user listened to the song in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "song_id", "listen_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "cluster_index" INTEGER /* Index of the song in the cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id", "song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended song */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "recommendation_score" REAL /* Score of the recommendation (used to rank recommendations) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "song_id", "recommendation_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres_hierarchy" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre */,
  "genre_level" INTEGER /* Level of the genre in the hierarchy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_hierarchy_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists_genres" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "genre_weight" REAL /* Weight of the genre for the artist (used for multi-genre classification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_playcounts" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "playcount" INTEGER /* Number of times the song has been played */,
  "playcount_date" TEXT /* Date the playcount was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_follows" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date the user followed the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_comments" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id", "user_id", "comment_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_ratings" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id", "user_id", "rating_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_similarities" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "similar_song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the similar song */,
  "similarity_score" REAL /* Score of the similarity between the two songs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id", "similar_song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "profile_name" TEXT /* Name of the user's profile */,
  "profile_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_profiles" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "profile_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist's profile */,
  "profile_description" TEXT /* Description of the artist's profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)
column_names: Length of the song in seconds
Weight of the genre for the song (used for multi-genre classification)
Duration of the song in milliseconds
Date the user joined the platform
ID of the user who created the playlist
Date the song was added to the playlist
Date the user listened to the song
Duration the user listened to the song in seconds

Score of the recommendation (used to rank recommendations)

Weight of the genre for the artist (used for multi-genre classification)
